_README: AI Center config (NOT secret). Edit model names to match what you have. Gemini API key lives in secrets/secrets.json, NOT here.

user_answer._doc: The PAID, user-facing brain. max_calls_per_turn caps Gemini usage per UI turn.

_ollama_cloud_note: To use a cloud/remote Ollama, change ollama_host to its URL and set ollama_auth_header to e.g. 'Bearer YOUR_TOKEN'.

ollama_tiers._doc: Map complexity -> a model you've pulled with `ollama pull`. Simple tasks use 'small'.
